name: abap-cloud-rap
description: ABAP Cloud / RAP overlay: clean core enforcement, RAP behavior design, CDS layering, ATC remediation. Three skills — /abap-cloud-rap:rap-bo-design, :atc-remediation, :clean-core-check — plus the auto-loaded CLAUDE.md rule set. Best paired with the clean-abap plugin. Targets BTP ABAP Environment and S/4HANA 2023+ in the ABAP Cloud development model.
